exercises.code:
from email.mime.text import MIMEText
msg = MIMEText('Hola', 'plain', 'utf-8')
print(msg.get_content_type(), "|", msg.get_content_charset())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Como explorer del paquete S22, resolví S22-T1-A-E1 (guided) apoyándome en la teoría «MIME, encoding, HTML/text y attachments» y en los demos iDo del card. La instrucción pide la salida contractual y el starter ya trae el fixture sintético; completé la operación de dominio sin borrar datos ni asserts. Hints del packet: from email.mime.text import MIMEText; print(msg['Content-Type']) o as_string.. Salida observada: text/plain | utf-8.

exercises.code:
from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart
from email.mime.application import MIMEApplication
msg = MIMEMultipart('mixed')
msg['Subject'] = 'Test'
att = MIMEApplication(b'x', Name='a.txt')
att['Content-Disposition'] = 'attachment; filename="a.txt"'
msg.attach(att)
print(any(p.get_content_disposition() == 'attachment' for p in msg.walk()))

Hints del packet: MIMEMultipart + attach; Content-Disposition filename. Salida observada: True.

exercises.code:
from urllib.parse import urlparse
urls = ['https://example.pe/a', 'https://evil.test']
allowed = {'example.pe'}
parts = []
for u in urls:
    host = urlparse(u).hostname or ''
    status = 'ok' if host in allowed else 'blocked'
    parts.append(f"{u} {status}")
print(" | ".join(parts))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Como explorer del paquete S22, resolví S22-T1-B-E3 (transfer) apoyándome en la teoría «templates y sanitización» y en los demos iDo del card. Hints del packet: if 'example.pe' in url; lista de prueba. Salida observada: https://example.pe/a ok | https://evil.test blocked.

exercises.code:
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
outs = []
for exp in (now - timedelta(minutes=1), now + timedelta(hours=1)):
    outs.append('refresh' if exp < now else 'valid')
print(" | ".join(outs))

exercises.code:
import re
pat = r'^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$'
outs = []
for e in ('ana@example.pe', 'bad'):
    outs.append(f"{e} {bool(re.match(pat, e))}")
print(" | ".join(outs))

exercises.code:
a, b = 'ana.rojas@example.pe', 'ana.rojas@example.com'
n = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):
    if x != y:
        break
    n += 1
score = n / max(len(a), len(b))
print(round(score, 2), 'match_no_es_fraude')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Como explorer del paquete S22, resolví S22-T3-A-E3 (transfer) apoyándome en la teoría «resolución y verificación» y en los demos iDo del card.
